scripts.test:coverage: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('coverage', { recursive: true, force: true })" && vitest run --coverage --testTimeout=120000 --hookTimeout=120000
scripts.test:gadugi: gadugi-test run -d gadugi -s "A3P Open / Parse / Render" && gadugi-test run -d gadugi -s "Tweedle AST & VM Execution" && gadugi-test run -d gadugi -s "Scene Entity Manipulation" && gadugi-test run -d gadugi -s "Event System" && gadugi-test run -d gadugi -s "Save / Export Round-Trip" && gadugi-test run -d gadugi -s "TypeScript Source Export Handoff" && gadugi-test run -d gadugi -s "Web Player Export Share Parity" && gadugi-test run -d gadugi -s "Alice HowTo parity audit CLI"
